author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Existing cli_integration.rs has 186 tests covering most CLI commands. The new smoke harness will be a SEPARATE test binary (tests/smoke.rs + tests/smoke/ modules) focused on what's missing: server API, WebSocket, multi-agent coordination, adversarial/torture tests, corruption recovery, boundary attacks, and the tooling commands (cpitd, workflow, context, style, design-doc, mc). The new harness will NOT duplicate existing CLI tests.
